title: Minimal Reproduction
description: Reduce a bug to the smallest reliable reproduction.
content:
Help me build a minimal reproduction of this bug: {{bug}}

Guide me to strip it down:
1. What to remove first to test whether it still reproduces.
2. How to replace external dependencies with fakes/stubs.
3. How to make it deterministic (seed randomness, pin time, fix ordering).

The goal is the smallest self-contained snippet that fails every time. Tell me what to try next based on what I report.
